nodes.name: Queen Bee Cluster
nodes.description: Management / DNS cluster (the k0rdent management context). Runs the Bindy operator, the BIND9 operands, and the canonical DNSZone and ARecord resources.

nodes.name: Queen Kubernetes API
nodes.description: API server of the Queen Bee cluster. Holds the canonical bindy-system namespace that every Scout fans records into.

nodes.name: Bindy Operator
nodes.description: The operator running on the Queen Bee cluster; reconciles ARecord CRs into BIND9 and manages zones.

nodes.name: BIND9 Operands
nodes.description: BIND9 named + bindcar operand pods on the Queen Bee cluster that actually serve DNS.

nodes.name: ARecord CRs (bindy-system)
nodes.description: Canonical ARecord resources in the Queen Bee bindy-system namespace, fanned in from every child cluster and stamped with a source-cluster label.

nodes.name: Child Cluster A
nodes.description: A workload cluster in the k0rdent fleet. Runs a Scout instance with its own independently revocable ServiceAccount credentials.

nodes.name: Bindy Scout A
nodes.description: Scout Deployment (image bindy, args=[scout]) on Child Cluster A. Watches local Ingress / LoadBalancer Service / HTTPRoute / TLSRoute and derives DNS names.

nodes.name: Ingress / Gateway (A)
nodes.description: Ingress objects, LoadBalancer Services, HTTPRoutes and TLSRoutes on Child Cluster A that expose workloads and carry the hostnames Scout resolves.

nodes.name: Child Cluster B
nodes.description: A second workload cluster, demonstrating record fan-in from many child clusters into one Queen Bee namespace.

nodes.name: Bindy Scout B
nodes.description: Scout Deployment on Child Cluster B with its own ServiceAccount, --cluster-name and remote kubeconfig.

nodes.name: Ingress / Gateway (B)
nodes.description: Ingress / Gateway API objects on Child Cluster B that Scout B observes.

relationships.description: the Queen Bee cluster hosts the operator, operands and canonical records
Child Cluster A hosts Scout A and its watched ingress objects
Child Cluster B hosts Scout B and its watched ingress objects
server-side-applies ARecord CRs via remote kubeconfig (per-cluster SA)
server-side-applies ARecord CRs via remote kubeconfig (per-cluster SA)
